narrative:
North Olmsted-01-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 993 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.4%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.7 percentage points.
